response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and distributed systems expertise, particularly in high-scale environments (Google, Meta). However, his experience lacks direct alignment with agentic AI in fintech, regulated environments, or CTO-level leadership scaling engineering teams. His open-source contributions and technical depth are notable, but the role's executive and domain-specific requirements are not fully met.
strengths: Proven track record in high-scale distributed systems and backend development at top-tier tech companies (Google, Meta).
Hands-on experience with event-driven architectures and real-time systems, relevant to agentic AI frameworks.
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership in tooling, testing, and developer infrastructure.
concerns: No explicit experience building or operating multi-agent AI systems in production, especially in fintech or regulated environments.
Lacks demonstrated CTO-level leadership scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people or developing senior technical leadership layers.
Fintech infrastructure experience (credit systems, payment flows) is limited and not a focal point of his career.
